description: Small-batch chef-inspired gummies with a jewel-soft bite, slow-poured like artisan pâte de fruit and dusted with a delicate sugar sparkle for that perfect candy-shop finish. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 50:1 ratio. Made for anyone who wants their edible to feel less like a dose and more like a little indulgence.
